title: Chalcis, Central Greece — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Chalcis is a city in Central Greece with a population of 102,223. Central Greece’s coastal city on the Euripus Strait, famous for its tidal bridge and proximity to Athens.
